context.question: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $72,000 on April 16?
context.market_title: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $72,000 on April 16?

decision.primary_crux: Bitcoin is still more likely than not to close above $72,000 on the April 16 noon ET Binance minute because same-venue spot around 74.2k leaves a real cushion, but the market at 0.935 is still too confident for a one-day, exact-minute settlement where a routine 3% selloff or badly timed wick can still decide the contract.
secondary_cruxes: The disagreement is pricing of exact-minute path risk, not contract direction or source identity.
A ~3% cushion with less than a day left is favorable, but not enough to justify mid-90s confidence from the bounded evidence set.
Minor UI-versus-API candle-mapping uncertainty is secondary, but it still reinforces caution at high prices.

valuation.compression_reason: Fresh same-venue verification supports a high-probability Yes view, but no independent volatility or event check materially reduced the remaining overnight downside-path risk, so fair value remains below market.

portfolio_constraints: Do not add fresh exposure at the current price.
Treat exact-minute Binance settlement risk as the dominant execution constraint.
Reopen only if market cheapens materially or a fresher near-settlement Binance check shows the cushion holding with calmer volatility.

bands.name: max_enter
bands.notes: Would require a much cheaper price and still a fresh Binance check near settlement.

bands.name: scaled_enter
bands.notes: Potential value zone only if same-venue cushion remains intact and overnight volatility stays contained.

bands.name: hold
bands.notes: Bounded fair-value zone; maintain watch-only hold posture.

bands.name: trim
bands.notes: Above fair value for a one-minute settlement contract with meaningful path dependence.

bands.name: exit
bands.notes: Avoid or exit at very rich prices because exact-minute downside tail dominates residual uncertainty.

thesis_breakers: BTC loses cushion and trades materially back toward 72k-73k on Binance before the Apr 16 fixing window.
A fresh downside catalyst or volatility shock materially raises the odds of a sub-72k settlement minute.
Binance-specific weakness or settlement-surface issues emerge near the resolving minute.
time_breakers: A fresh direct Binance observation closer to Apr 16 12:00 ET should supersede this packet before any action.
The actual Apr 16 12:00 ET Binance 1-minute close fully resolves and obsoletes this judgment.
market_structure_breakers: Market price moves materially again without corresponding same-venue spot support, changing the value comparison.
Binance operational or microstructure issues emerge near settlement.
reversal_conditions: Upgrade only if price becomes materially cheaper relative to fair value or if a fresh pre-fix Binance check shows a meaningfully larger cushion.
Downgrade if BTC loses cushion or if downside volatility or catalyst risk increases.
Do not auto-reverse from this packet.

key_uncertainties: The true probability of a ~3% downside move or wick landing exactly at the settlement minute.
Whether overnight and U.S.-morning conditions remain calm into the fixing window.
How much the minor Binance candle-mapping sensitivity matters in practice.
what_would_change_my_mind: A fresh Binance check near settlement still showing BTC comfortably above 73.5k-74k with calm volatility would move me somewhat closer to market.
A move back toward 72.5k-73k would reduce fair value materially.
A materially cheaper market price with unchanged Binance cushion would create a cleaner edge.
reasons_to_pass: The current market price is above bounded fair value.
This is a one-minute single-venue settlement contract where path risk matters more than broad BTC direction.
The edge is modest and not robust enough to justify authorization.

audit.one_sentence_rationale: BTC is still more likely than not to finish above $72,000 on the April 16 Binance noon minute, but with fair value closer to 0.885 than the 0.935 market and meaningful exact-minute downside-path risk still live, the disciplined output remains watch-only rather than an authorized Yes trade.
audit.notes: This remains a high-probability but overconfident crypto threshold market: directional Yes survives, execution value does not.
